title: German Tourist Wins Lawsuit After Not Getting a Lounge Chair by the Pool
summary_full: A tourist won a refund after a court ruled that the hotel’s staff had failed to stop guests from reserving sun beds using towels.
summary_public: A tourist won a refund after a court ruled that the hotel’s staff had failed to stop guests from reserving sun beds using towels.
